ideation: This animation depicts a playful fox with sly, inquisitive movements.  The sequence starts neutral, then transitions to a 'peek-a-boo' like pose with one arm covering its face, followed by a quick, alternating arm raise suggesting alertness and curiosity, and ending back in a neutral pose. The left arm will do most of the expression here.

frames.beat: both arms hang low, neutral fox stance
left arm rises to playfully cover the face
left arm quickly drops, peeking out slyly
right arm mirrors the left, a quick curious peek
both arms return to a relaxed, watchful pose
